mapper.insert: INSERT INTO role_permissions (role_id, permission_id, created_time) VALUES (#{roleId}, #{permissionId}, #{createdTime})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM role_permissions WHERE role_id = #{roleId} AND permission_id = #{permissionId}
mapper.select: SELECT permission_id FROM role_permissions WHERE role_id = #{roleId}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO role_permissions (role_id, permission_id, created_time) VALUES
(#{roleId}, #{permissionId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
